description: Transfer to a fraudulent investment scheme promising 40% monthly returns. Classic Ponzi scheme indicators.

transaction.purpose: Investment in Guaranteed Returns Scheme - promised 40% monthly returns by WhatsApp group admin

risk_factors.description: Purpose matches 'guaranteed returns' investment scam pattern (92% similarity)
First-ever transfer to this entity, added 2 days ago
Amount is 10x your typical transaction of ₹5,000
Contains urgency markers suggesting social pressure

expected_explanation: This transaction exhibits multiple red flags consistent with investment scam patterns. No legitimate investment can guarantee 40% monthly returns. The recipient was added only 2 days ago, and the amount is 10x your average. This pattern matches known Ponzi schemes operating via WhatsApp groups.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: I've detected significant risk indicators in this transaction. Before processing, I need to verify a few things. How did you first learn about this investment opportunity?

expected_conversation.speaker: Customer
expected_conversation.message: Someone in a WhatsApp group shared it. They showed screenshots of their profits.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: Thank you. Screenshots of profits are easily fabricated and are a hallmark of Ponzi schemes. Have you independently verified if 'GR Investments Pvt Ltd' is registered with SEBI or any financial regulator?

expected_conversation.speaker: Customer
expected_conversation.message: No, I haven't checked with SEBI. The admin said registration isn't needed for this type of scheme.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: That's a major red flag. ALL legitimate investment schemes in India must be registered with SEBI. Guaranteeing 40% monthly returns is mathematically unsustainable and illegal under SEBI regulations. I strongly recommend cancelling this transaction. This matches patterns of known Ponzi schemes that have caused significant financial losses.

expected_conversation.speaker: Customer
expected_conversation.message: Thank you for the warning. I didn't realize this was a scam. I will cancel.
